Name: iReduceBattleAi
Description: Affects agent's ai. 0 - good, 1 - average, 2 - poor.  Operations: options_get_combat_ai, options_set_combat_ai.

Name: iMinNumAgentsForNavMeshReuse
Description: Used for ai agent compute path.

Name: bUseAdvancedFormation
Description:
Determines if the module uses Native’s advanced formations. Those add extensions to the order menus related to formations and weapon usage.
Players can then let the troops line up from one row to five rows and order their archers to fire at their command. Some lines need to be added to ui.csv for this.

Name: bAiDecideDirectionAccordingToDamage
Description: AI will take into consideration what each directional attack’s damage will be when deciding what attack to use.

Name: bConsiderWeaponLengthForWeaponQuality
Description: Makes agents take into account a weapon’s length when choosing a weapon at their inventory.
